skillTree.localised_description: The unnatural speed and brutality of a reanimated Promethean makes it the ideal mount for Dick Half-Mast to spread news on Tuesday!

attributes.bullet_text: This unit frightens all enemy units, reducing their leadership when nearby. It is also immune to fear. Fear penalties do not stack.
When bracing, this unit negates the charge bonus of any large attacker.
This unit provides a leadership bonus to nearby allies. Units within range of both the Lord's aura and an encouraging unit will receive the larger of the two bonuses.
This unit can hide in forests until enemy units get too close.

Undead units cannot be routed, but take damage when their Leadership is broken.
	
	Undead units also have:
	 Fear and Terror Immunity
	
	Undead units may also have their hit points restored by special characters such as the Vampire Counts Necromancer.

skillTree.localised_description: "It's a rabbit's foot. A rabbit. No… Oh never mind - it brings me luck. It does! Trust me!"
You'd better kill this one or they'll keep coming back until one of you is dead. Even then, there's no guarantee it'll be over!
"They said soon. They always say soon. We hunger still. Send News!"
"Lads, brace yerselves... he’s unsheathing it again."

ui_effects.localised_text: Requires line of sight to the target

effects.description:
Missile strength: +10% for Artillery units
	(Hero's army)

skillTree.localised_description: "Every map leads to treasure. Some just happen to lead to the tavern!"
“Filthier than the bilge and twice as slippery. Leaves a trail wherever he goes.”

effects.description:
Campaign movement range: -10%
	(enemy armies in local province)

skillTree.localised_description: “Once they start pumping out of the hull, it’s already too late!”

target_if: Not on or below a platform

ui_effects.localised_text: Summons a unit of Zombie Pirate Deckhands Mob

skillTree.localised_description: "He claims it’s just seafoam. The crew isn’t so sure."
"Every third Tuesday at 3:32am, he dons his finest hat, stands dead still in the neighbor’s yard, and does what must be done. The sea understands. The crew does not."

related_attributes.bullet_text: This unit does not suffer any form of leadership loss and will never rout.

attributes.bullet_text: Even when performing the most fatiguing actions, this unit never loses vigour.

skillTree.localised_description: "Yes, they’re from the east. Annoying, yet useful - their hides, particularly…"
Assuming you get it right and your shot doesn't turn to flowers on impact, these little extras tend to bring advantage.
"If all else fails, shoot it squarely and dive into the drink!"

effects.description: Ability number of uses: +1 for "More Powder!"

skillTree.localised_description: …literally, though they never miss.
…because once they're in the water, you want your targets to stay there… forever.
Dulcet tones sound like whalesong beneath the waves, calling the monsters of the deep to your service?

effects.description:
Recruit rank: +2 for all units
	(Hero's army)

skillTree.localised_description: Death is always just a shot away.
"It's got a few secret ingredients. No, I won't tell you what they are, but the results will speak for themselves."
"Get more ammo up here, NOW!!!!!!!!"
"The recoil's a nightmare, but you can't deny the end result!"
A clever arrangement of lenses makes the target seem just that bit closer.
A thunderous blast from below decks, delivered with gusto and zero shame. Guaranteed to leave ‘em breathless, bruised, and questioning their life choices.
There are Lords that radiate power, confidence and fear, inspiring their followers to great or terrible acts.

effects.description:
Unit experience gain per turn: +75
	(Lord's army)

skillTree.localised_description: Bone, muscle and sinew cannot always be relied upon to hold together unassisted.

skillTree.localised_description: Like Unliving moths drawn inexorably towards a dazzling flame, the risen drowned strive - and stumble - to always be close to the one who has bound them.

skillTree.localised_description: "Listen very carefully, me hearties, I shall say this only once… Quiet! Stromfels' stinkin' breath!"
The once-men of the Undead legions march ever onwards, according to the will of their binder.

skillTree.localised_description: "Now listen up an' listen good… here be the plan…"
Those who know the land and its secrets will travel faster and further than the foes who don't.
They could not break free, even if they wanted to.
Cursed to haunt the waves forever, never finding rest or solace.
If it's not tacked down, this one'll 'ave it and kill anyone who gets in their way.

skillTree.localised_description: "You'll never find such a crew - villainous scum, the lot of 'em. I certainly wouldn't want to be facing 'em in the thick of battle!"

items.colour_text: "This is my rifle, this is my gun, this one is for shooting, this one is for fun!"

related_attributes.bullet_text: Even when performing the most fatiguing actions, this unit never loses vigour.

items.colour_text: Richard the Half Mast’s wretched flagship, a waterlogged ruin of a vessel barely held together by salt, spite, and sheer undead determination. Though its bowsprit droops and its hull groans under the weight of years at sea, it remains a terror on the tides, crashing through battles with all the reckless abandon of its bawdy, half-risen captain.

attributes.bullet_text: Even when performing the most fatiguing actions, this unit never loses vigour.

backgroundSkills.localised_description: For you, the day I graced your village was the most important day of your life. But for me, it was Tuesday.
